conservative.name: Rampaging Mutation
conservative.requirements: Engaged with target. The target or one of his allies must have rolled G on a check in your presence previously during this encounter

success.description: You unleash a horrific assault fueled by a surge of energy granted by the Ruinous Powers. The attack inflicts +1 damage

chaosStar.description: Your flesh twists and erupts with a new gift from your dark god - a mutation. Gain a random mutation. If it has the Monstrous trait, deal additional damage equal to is severity (assuming you hit)

sigmarsComet.description: If the target is suffering from any corruption, +1 damage per corruption. Otherwise +2 damage.

reckless.name: Rampaging Mutation
reckless.requirements:
Used By: Chaos Spawn, Chaos Warrior
Engaged with target, a Chaos enemy must have rolled G during a previous Melee Attack this encounter

success.description: The servant of Chaos unleashes a horrific assault fueled by a surge of eldritch power granted by the Ruinous Powers. The attack inflicts normal damage

chaosStar.description: The attacker is obliterated by the Ruinous Powers. It is immediately killed after this action is resolved. All targets in the engagement (friend and foe) suffer 1 wound which cannot be avoided, redirected, or reduced by any means
